theme: Rome turns business into living history

linkedin.text: Rome doesn't host events. It elevates them. Imagine your conference dinner steps from two thousand years of history, your team toasting beneath floodlit ruins, your message delivered against the backdrop of an eternal city. UPE produces corporate experiences in Rome that fuse strategy with spectacle. Ready to make your next event eternal? Reach out today. #UproductionEvents #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Rome #ItalyEvents #GalaDinner #EventProduction

image_prompt: Sweeping aerial drone shot of Rome at dusk, the Colosseum and ancient ruins glowing amber, terracotta rooftops sprawling toward the horizon, the dome of a basilica catching the last light, no people visible up close, vast cinematic scale. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
